questions.question: Find the catastrophic bug that skips the if-block and ruins the player's health.
questions.explanation: Instead of checking equality `==`, a single `=` assigns playerHealth to 0. Since 0 is False, the block is skipped AND the player now has 0 health!

questions.question: Find the bug that causes an infinite loop.
questions.explanation: The update statement `countDown--` is commented out! Since countDown never changes from 5, it will always be > 0. The loop runs forever.

questions.question: Find the bug that causes Fall-Through in this switch block.
questions.explanation: There is no `break;` at the end of `case 1`. The program will print 'Starting Game' AND 'Settings' because it falls through into case 2.

questions.question: Find the logic bug in this short-circuit test.
questions.explanation: The logical OR `||` requires only ONE of the conditions to be True. The print statement says BOTH items are required. It should use Logical AND `&&`.

questions.question: Find the syntax error causing this do-while loop to fail compilation.
questions.explanation: Unlike a standard `while` loop, a `do-while` loop MUST end with a semicolon `;` after the conditional parenthesis.
